name: flow-brainstorming
description: 在 /flow-init 阶段强制触发，用于捕捉需求的原始意图、探索方案、记录决策。确保后续流程有明确的北极星可追溯。
capabilities: Guide one-question-at-a-time conversations to understand user needs
Explore 2-3 alternative approaches with trade-offs analysis
Present design in incremental segments for validation
Generate BRAINSTORM.md documentation with original intent, constraints, and decisions
Verify alignment between subsequent phases and original requirements
Prevent scope creep by documenting decision rationale
author: Dimon94
securitySummary: Pure prompt-only skill containing only documentation and workflow guidance. No executable code, network requests, filesystem access, or external command execution. The static findings are false positives from the analyzer misinterpreting documentation strings, URLs, and markdown code blocks.
valueStatement: Teams often start building before understanding the true problem. This skill transforms vague ideas into clear requirements through structured conversation. It captures original intent, explores multiple approaches, and documents decisions for traceability.
userTitle: Capture requirements and explore solution options
limitations: Only triggers during /flow-init phase, not a standalone tool
Does not generate code, tests, or implementation details
Requires user engagement for requirement clarification
Output quality depends on user input clarity and cooperation

useCases.title: Transform vague ideas into specs
useCases.description: Convert abstract product visions into structured requirements with clear success criteria

useCases.title: Explore solution alternatives
useCases.description: Evaluate multiple technical approaches with trade-offs before committing to a design

useCases.title: Create requirement documentation
useCases.description: Generate BRAINSTORM.md files that serve as reference points throughout the project

promptTemplates.title: New feature request
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me define requirements for a new feature. What problem does it solve and what are the core requirements?

promptTemplates.title: Refactoring decision
promptTemplates.prompt: I want to refactor the authentication module. What approaches should I consider and what are their trade-offs?

promptTemplates.title: Bug fix analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: We have a performance issue reported by users. Help me explore possible causes and solutions.

promptTemplates.title: Design validation
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my proposed solution and check if it aligns with the original requirements I documented.

bestPractices: Ask one question at a time with multiple-choice options for faster responses
Always explore 2-3 alternatives before committing to a solution approach
Document decision rationale to prevent future scope creep debates
antiPatterns: Skipping brainstorming and jumping directly to implementation
Assuming requirements are clear without asking clarifying questions
Making technical decisions without recording the trade-offs considered

faq.question: What tools is this skill compatible with?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code CLI environments.

faq.question: What happens if I skip the brainstorming phase?
faq.answer: The skill enforces brainstorming as an entry gate. Subsequent flow phases require BRAINSTORM.md alignment verification.

faq.question: Can I use this outside the /flow-init phase?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for the /flow-init phase but its questioning technique applies to any requirements gathering session.

faq.question: Is my data safe when generating BRAINSTORM.md?
faq.answer: The skill only writes documentation files locally. No data is sent to external servers or third-party services.

faq.question: How does this compare to other planning tools?
faq.answer: Unlike generic planners, this skill enforces YAGNI principles and requires documenting decision rationale for traceability.

faq.question: What if requirements change during development?
faq.answer: The skill includes alignment checks in later phases to detect drift from original intent and prompts documentation updates.
